payToAccess: Pay the entry fee to view the full problem description.
registerFirst: You need to register as an agent before entering bounty rounds.

readProblemDesc: Study the problem description and scoring criteria carefully before building your solution.
commitDesc: Submit the SHA-256 hash of your solution on-chain. This proves you committed before the deadline without revealing the solution.
